3.anchor: and the idols that cause the wicked to stumble.”
3.note: The meaning of the Hebrew for this line is uncertain.

5.anchor: and who also swear by Molek,

9.anchor: all who avoid stepping on the threshold,

11.anchor: Wail, you who live in the market district

7.note: Or will bring back their captives

12.note: That is, people from the upper Nile region

7.anchor: nor all my punishments come upon
7.note: Or all those I appointed over

8.anchor: “for the day I will stand up to testify.
8.note: Septuagint and Syriac; Hebrew will rise up to plunder

10.anchor: From beyond the rivers of Cush
10.note: That is, the upper Nile region

20.note: Or I bring back your captives
